nasb.text: He said to her, “Give me your son.” Then he took him from her bosom and carried him up to the upper room where he was living, and laid him on his own bed.

esv.text: And he said to her, “Give me your son.” And he took him from her arms and carried him up into the upper chamber where he lodged, and laid him on his own bed.

cnv.text: 以利亞對她說：“把你的兒子交給我吧！”以利亞就從她的懷中把孩子接過來，抱他上到自己所住的樓上去，放在自己的床上。

ccb.text: 以利亚对妇人说：“把你儿子交给我。”随后，他从妇人怀中接过孩子，抱到楼上自己的房间，放在床上。
